headline: Shares of precious metals-related companies are trading lower as the U.S.–Iran standoff drives oil prices higher, rising inflation concerns and reinforcing expectations of higher-for-longer interest rates, which in turn pressure gold and silver prices.

headline: Should You Buy, Sell or Hold AEM Stock Ahead of Q1 Earnings?
summary: AEM's Q1 performance is expected to have benefited from higher gold prices and strong production amid cost headwinds.
